OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Saves an employer's responses to a workers' compensation claim and creates an individual application.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreateIndividualApplicationForClaimResponse

omniProcessElements.name: FetchClaimDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "claimid" : "=%RespondToClaim:ClaimId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsFetchClaimDetails", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: GetUserPersonAccountId
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "userId" : "=%RespondToClaim:userId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsGetPersonAccountIDOfApplicant", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "User", "responseJSONPath" : "User", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSSCreateIndividualApplicationEmployee
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "=%User:AccountId%", "ApplicationType" : "Acknowledged Claim", "DRId_Claim" : "=%RespondToClaim:ClaimId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSSocInsCreateIndividualApplication", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "IndividualApplicationId", "responseJSONPath" : "IndividualApplication_1:Id", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: Save-Responses
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "remoteClass" : "omnistudio.StoreResponses", "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "remoteOptions" : { "Assessment.AssessmentStatus" : "Completed", "Assessment.Name" : "%SetAssessmentName:AssessmentName%", "Assessment.ResponseContextId" : "%IndividualApplicationId%" }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "description" : "", "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "labelPlural" : "", "labelSingular" : "", "linkToExternalObject" : "", "mockResponseMap" : { }, "nameColumn" : "", "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "rollbackOnError" : true, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "ttlMinutes" : 5 }
